webview.notes: Stronger ad/redirect blocking: upgraded hostname filter list (HaGeZi), block forced cross-site player redirects, and a new optional 'Block all page redirects (strict)' toggle in Settings.

full.notes: Stronger ad/redirect blocking: upgraded hostname filter list (HaGeZi) and block forced cross-site player redirects (WebView engine). Note: the 'Block all page redirects' toggle is not yet active on the GeckoView engine.
